v1BusinessMetric.description: A business identifier, label, and one or more data points for analytics reporting.

businessId.title: Required. Business ID (Account ID). Format: AG-XXXXXXXX

label.title: Required. Label identifying the metric type. Example: "click", "NetSyncGoogleMapViews"

points.description: Required. Data points to be collected and aggregated.

v1BusinessMetric.title: BusinessMetric

v1DateRange.description: A date range filter with inclusive start and end dates.
v1DateRange.title: DateRange

v1DeleteBusinessMetricRequest.description: Request to soft delete a metric point by its unique identifier.

id.description: Required. Unique identifier (UUID) of the metric point to delete.

v1DeleteBusinessMetricRequest.title: DeleteBusinessMetricRequest

v1DeleteBusinessMetricResponse.description: Result of a single metric point deletion, indicating success or failure.

id.description: Output only. UUID of the processed metric point.

v1DeleteBusinessMetricResponse.title: DeleteBusinessMetricResponse

v1DeleteMultiBusinessMetricsRequest.description: Request to soft delete multiple metric points in a single call.

businessMetrics.description: Required. List of metric point IDs to delete.

v1DeleteMultiBusinessMetricsRequest.title: DeleteMultiBusinessMetricsRequest

v1DeleteMultiBusinessMetricsResponse.description: Response containing results for each deletion attempt in a batch delete.

businessMetrics.description: Output only. Deletion results. Successfully deleted points have no error field.

v1DeleteMultiBusinessMetricsResponse.title: DeleteMultiBusinessMetricsResponse

v1Error.description: Error details for a failed operation.

code.description: Output only. Error code. Code 1: point does not exist or is already deleted.

v1Error.title: Error

v1GetBusinessMetricPointRequest.description: Request to retrieve a single metric point by its unique identifier.

id.description: Required. Unique identifier (UUID) of the metric point to retrieve.

v1GetBusinessMetricPointRequest.title: GetBusinessMetricPointRequest

v1GetBusinessMetricPointResponse.description: Complete details for a single metric point including source, value, and timestamps.

aggregationKey.description: Output only. Aggregation key used to group this point with others.

businessId.title: Output only. Business ID (Account ID). Format: AG-XXXXXXXX

created.title: Output only. When this point was created. Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ

dateHappened.title: Output only. When the measurement occurred. Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ

dateHappenedKey.description: Output only. Internal date key for indexing (Unix timestamp in nanoseconds).

deleted.description: Output only. Whether this point has been soft-deleted.

source.description: Output only. Source identifier (typically the user identifier or service account) that submitted the point.

value.description: Output only. Integer value of the metric point.

v1GetBusinessMetricPointResponse.title: GetBusinessMetricPointResponse

v1GetBusinessMetricRequest.description: Request to retrieve metric points for a business, filtered by label and date range.

businessId.title: Required. Business ID (Account ID). Format: AG-XXXXXXXX

cursor.description: Optional. Pagination cursor from previous response. Leave empty for initial request.

label.description: Required. Label identifying the metric type. Must match the label used when pushing data.

pageSize.description: Optional. Maximum number of points to return per page.

v1GetBusinessMetricRequest.title: GetBusinessMetricRequest

v1GetBusinessMetricResponse.description: Response containing paginated metric points for a business.

cursor.description: Output only. Pagination cursor for next page. Empty if no more results.

v1GetBusinessMetricResponse.title: GetBusinessMetricResponse

v1Point.description: A single measurement or event at a specific time. Points with the same aggregation_key are grouped together.

aggregationKey.title: Required. Tag used to group points for aggregation. Example: "web", "mobile", "organic"

dateHappened.title: Required. When the measurement occurred. Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ

id.description: Output only. Unique identifier assigned by the system. Leave empty when creating new points.

v1Point.title: Point

scopes.business: Allows the application to manage your business profiles
scopes.business.metrics: Allows the application to manage business metrics
scopes.business:read: Allows the application view-only access to your business profiles

post.description:
Submit one or more data points grouped by aggregation_key. Points with the same
aggregation_key will be aggregated together when building report cards.

**Limitations:**
- Only integer values (intval) are currently supported; strval support coming soon
- For fractions: submit numerator and denominator as separate points with different aggregation keys
- For decimals: submit as integers (multiply by 10 or 100) and note in submission

**Date Format:** YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ (e.g., "2020-02-05T15:04:05Z")

requestBody.description: A business identifier, label, and one or more data points for analytics reporting.

post.description:
The point is marked as deleted but not permanently removed. Returns 404 if already deleted
or does not exist.

requestBody.description: Request to soft delete a metric point by its unique identifier.

post.description:
Each point is processed individually. The response includes successfully deleted points
(no error field) and failed deletions with error details. Error code 1 indicates the
point does not exist or is already deleted.

requestBody.description: Request to soft delete multiple metric points in a single call.

post.description:
Returns paginated results. Use the cursor from the response to retrieve additional pages.
Leave cursor empty for the initial request.

requestBody.description: Request to retrieve metric points for a business, filtered by label and date range.

post.description:
Returns complete details including source, business_id, label, value, timestamps,
aggregation_key, and deletion status.

requestBody.description: Request to retrieve a single metric point by its unique identifier.
